function.name: lookup_patient
function.description: Search for existing patient by phone number. Use when patient says they visited before. Ask for phone number FIRST, then use name to verify if multiple family members share the same phone.

phone.description: Patient phone number (primary lookup field - ask for this FIRST)

name.description: Patient name (used to verify/disambiguate when multiple patients share the same phone)

function.name: store_patient
function.description: Create new patient record with full pre-assessment info. Use when patient is new. Collect all info through conversation before calling. Age is auto-calculated from date of birth.

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

past_medical_history.description: Ongoing health conditions like diabetes, hypertension, asthma, thyroid issues etc. Use 'None' if patient has no conditions.

smoking_status.description: Smoking/tobacco use status, e.g. 'Never', 'Former smoker', 'Current smoker - 5 cigarettes/day'

alcohol_use.description: Alcohol consumption, e.g. 'None', 'Occasional', 'Social - weekends', '2-3 drinks per week'

function.name: update_complaint
function.description: Record a returning patient's visit reason. Use the patient's full name (not patient_id). Call this after lookup_patient confirms who they are.

name.description: Patient's full name exactly as confirmed (e.g. 'Raj Sharma')
